name: agent-responsibility-tick-scripted
describe: Deterministic agentResponsibility tick: runs the slug's `tickScript:` (declared in the agentResponsibility profile), parses next-state from its stdout, persists. No agent.

inputs.name: force
inputs.describe: Accepted for parity with `agent-responsibility-tick`. Scripted ticks have no agent cadence guard to bypass — the dispatcher already gated on profile `every`. Forwarded to the script via env if it cares.

cliTools.name: gh
cliTools.usage: Available to the tickScript via PATH; this agentAction shells out to `bash <tickScript>`. Scripts use `gh pr list`, `gh pr comment`, etc.
